infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Radius needs microphone access for push-to-talk voice transmission
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Radius uses your location to find nearby channels
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Radius uses your location in the background to keep channel membership current

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Radius to use your location for geo-fenced channels.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Radius to access your microphone for push-to-talk.
